title: Product pitch deck
description: Create a persuasive product pitch deck for enterprise buyers.

question.query: Create a 9-11 slide enterprise sales pitch deck for a browser-based AI agent platform. The deck should cover the customer problem, product workflow, differentiators, proof points, security posture, rollout plan, and close with a clear ask.
question.query_chinese: 为一个基于浏览器的 AI agent 平台制作一份 9-11 页的企业销售 pitch PPT。PPT 应覆盖客户问题、产品工作流、差异化优势、证明点、安全姿态、推广计划，并以明确请求收尾。
